name: TherPup Café
conciergeRecommendation: This charming café in Koramangala is a local favourite among pet parents. The outdoor garden seating is perfect for your furry friend to relax while you enjoy their signature cold brew. Don't miss the pupcakes – freshly baked every morning!

name: Paws & Brew
conciergeRecommendation: An excellent craft beer destination that welcomes your four-legged companion on their spacious patio. The weekend brunches here are legendary. Pro tip: Visit during happy hours for the best experience.

name: Woof & Waffle
conciergeRecommendation: Bandra's most Instagram-worthy pet café! The pawffles are a must-try, and the staff keeps treats handy for your pets. Perfect for celebrating special occasions with your furry friend.

name: Bark & Bite
conciergeRecommendation: A sophisticated choice in GK for discerning pet parents. The chicken jerky from their pet menu is a crowd favourite. Reserve the corner booth for privacy with your pet.

name: Third Wave Coffee Roasters
conciergeRecommendation: While they don't have a dedicated pet menu, their outdoor seating is incredibly pet-friendly with water bowls always ready. Great coffee and a relaxed vibe make this ideal for morning walks with your companion.

name: Cafe Azzure
conciergeRecommendation: HSR's hidden gem for pet dining! Their rooftop offers stunning views, and the pup pasta is specially crafted by their chef. Booking recommended for weekends.

name: Toit Brewpub
conciergeRecommendation: Bangalore's iconic brewery welcomes pets in their beer garden. While they don't serve pet food, the outdoor space is perfect for socializing with other pet parents over craft beers.

name: Green Theory
conciergeRecommendation: A vegan paradise that extends its philosophy to pet meals too! Their pumpkin pupcakes are made with organic ingredients. Ideal for health-conscious pet parents.

name: The Barking Deer
conciergeRecommendation: Mumbai's premier pet-friendly brewery in Lower Parel. Their non-alcoholic 'Pup Beer' is a fun novelty. The live music nights create a wonderful atmosphere for dining with your pet.

name: Suzette
conciergeRecommendation: French elegance meets pet hospitality in Bandra. The outdoor crêperie seating is perfect for your companion. Their plain crêpe bites make an excellent treat for your pet.

name: Sequel Bistro
petMenuItems: Grilled Fish Bites|Chicken Bowl|Coconut Ice Cream
conciergeRecommendation: Juhu's beachside bistro offers spectacular sunset views with your pet. Their grilled fish bites are sourced fresh daily. A premium dining experience worth the splurge.

name: Le Pain Quotidien
conciergeRecommendation: Colaba's organic bakery has dog-friendly outdoor tables with complimentary biscuits. Perfect for a healthy breakfast with your pet before a walk along Marine Drive.

name: Cafe Monza
conciergeRecommendation: Powai's lakeside Italian spot is a visual treat for both you and your pet. The plain pasta makes a safe, delicious option for your furry diner.

name: Diggin
conciergeRecommendation: Delhi's most beloved garden café! The ambiance is magical, and the doggy pizza is legendary. Book the swing tables for the best experience with your pet.

name: Cafe Lota
conciergeRecommendation: A cultural experience at Pragati Maidan with your pet. Their traditional Indian flavours can be enjoyed while your companion relaxes in the outdoor heritage setting.

name: Cafe Tesu
conciergeRecommendation: Saket's garden café offers brunch like no other. The doggy brunch bowl is curated by their chef. Perfect for leisurely weekend mornings with your pet.

name: Smokehouse Deli
conciergeRecommendation: Khan Market's premium deli welcomes pets at outdoor tables. While they offer basic treats, the real charm is the people-watching with your companion.

name: Petisfaction Café
petMenuItems: Complete Pet Menu|Pupcakes|Dog Ice Cream|Birthday Cakes|Bone Broth
conciergeRecommendation: Gurugram's dedicated pet café is a paradise! Complete pet menu, play areas, and even birthday party arrangements. A must-visit for serious pet parents.

name: Dogs Bay Café
petMenuItems: Dog Birthday Cake|Chicken Platter|Veggie Bowl|Frozen Yogurt
conciergeRecommendation: Noida's most comprehensive pet dining destination. Their swimming pool for dogs and birthday celebration packages make this a one-stop destination for pet joy.
